title: WorkTrace auth-user record (v1)
description: One file per user in worktrace-auth/users/<username>.json. Encrypted PAT (with AES-GCM under a PBKDF2-derived key from the user's password) plus public metadata. The file is world-readable; the secret stays protected by the password.

data_repo.description: GitHub `owner/repo` of this user's data repo. NULL for admin-only records that don't have personal data.

managed_repos.description: Admin only — explicit list of repos this admin can administer (e.g. for listing all users). Stored for UI convenience; the actual auth comes from the encrypted PAT's GitHub permissions.

kdf.description: Hard-coded for v1. Future schemas will widen.

iterations.description: PBKDF2 iteration count. 600_000 is the OWASP 2023 minimum for SHA-256.

ciphertext.description: Base64-encoded AES-GCM ciphertext (includes the 16-byte MAC tag).
